scriptsComments.watch: Master script that runs both scripts required to watch, build and copy the client in parallel. NOTE: run the test site with `dotnet watch --no-hot-reload` to avoid browser reloads when Umbraco sends token authentication requests to the backoffice.
scriptsComments.dev:vite: Starts the vite dev server and watches for changes, incremental builds on file changes
scriptsComments.dev:copy: Monitors the output of the build script and copies the client to the package backoffice folder
scriptsComments.build: Builds the client, and runs post-build scripts to copy the client to the package backoffice folder
scriptsComments.build:copy: Builds the client, and runs post-build scripts to copy the client to both the package backoffice folder and the test site package backoffice folder
scriptsComments.build:release: Sets the version, builds the client, and runs post-build scripts to copy the client to both the package backoffice folder and the test site package backoffice folder
scriptsComments.generate-client: This master script runs all generators in sequence
scriptsComments.set-version: Sets the version in package.json and umbraco-package.json

scripts.build:release: npm run set-version && vite build && node ./scripts/post-build.js

dependenciesComments.monaco-editor: Articulate Markdown Editor, only required until Umbraco Core editor supports better markdown to HTML processing; see https://github.com/umbraco/Umbraco-CMS/issues/19500
